arts.ttl: Same as Saliba? Chelsea survive last defender red card scare

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool have a different shirt sponsor for Premier League clash with Chelsea
arts.sum: Liverpool normally wear Standard Chartered's logo on the front of their shirts but the Reds have made a one-game-only change for their match against Chelsea at Anfield

arts.ttl: Chelsea career over? Mudryk EXCLUDED for Liverpool clash
arts.sum: The Ukraine winger scored his first goal in 20 games while on international duty last week, but he has been dropped by Enzo Maresca after an underwhelming start to the new campaign. Mudryk’s exclusion from Chelsea’s squad against Liverpool comes following reports that he could leave Stamford Bridge during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea, Tottenham 'in hot pursuit' of £30m-rated teenager after contract decision
arts.sum: Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur reportedly retain an interest in signing Lecce left-back Patrick Dorgu, despite the fact that he has only just extended his contract.

arts.ttl: Liverpool team vs Chelsea: Diaz and Mac Allister miss out
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his Liverpool team to face Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. Liverpool’s South American contingent all drop to the bench for the clash at Anfield, following long periods of travel during the international break.
